gates_enforced: INV-C5 (apply_plan Candidate-only write — Step 1 REAL pipeline)
INV-P2 (keyword hint ≠ executable predicate — operator binding zorunlu)
INV-P3 (translation preserves candidate meaning — ambiguity computed, REAL pipeline)
INV-C3 (Candidate→Accepted promotion — enforced in-crate by store_promotion_requires_operator_acceptance; acceptance state seeded in this replay)

steps.invariant: INV-C5: apply_plan her zaman Candidate yazar
steps.name: Human sentence → RuleCandidate (REAL pipeline run, INV-C5 Candidate)
steps.pipeline_trace: ConceptPacket (ExplicitUser) → Classifier ('must not' RULE_MARKERS → rule signal true; 'must' REQUIREMENT_MARKERS → packet Requirement) → Extractor (DerivesRule) → gate → AnchorPlan → apply_plan → graph insert
steps.sentence: Coupling must not exceed module threshold.
steps.sentence_selection_rationale: rule name derived from first 3 words (derive_rule_name); lowering scans canonical for axis keywords (coupling/cohesion/...) — sentence chosen so canonical preserves 'coupling'

steps.name: RuleCandidate in concept graph (INV-C3 Candidate lane)

predicate_stub.invariant: INV-P1: RuleCandidate lowering produces PredicateStub, never ExecutablePredicateSet

cross_family_hint.invariant: INV-P3: Translation preserves candidate meaning; binding alone creates commitment

steps.name: CrossFamilyHint (INV-P3 — ambiguity-preserving translation, REAL pipeline output)

executable_predicate_set.invariant: INV-P2: keyword hint ≠ executable predicate — operator binding zorunlu

accepted_task_candidate_ref.reason_seeded: OperatorAcceptance is pub(crate) by INV-C3 design; integration test cannot mint it. Promotion enforced in-crate; replay seeds the Accepted state. Faz 8 operator console gerçek API ile bu gate'i açar.

steps.name: Accepted TaskCandidate verified (INV-C3 — acceptance SEEDED, promotion enforced in-crate)

task.allowed_operations_provenance: operator-supplied at task genesis (create_task_from_accepted_candidate parameter) — not derived from binding, not hardcoded
task.label: Task from accepted candidate: ReduceCoupling

registry.note: Task is navigator-compatible — Paper 2 AgentNavigator can run_task with this Task.

subtitle: Candidate→Accepted promotion (INV-C3) enforced in-crate (store_promotion_requires_operator_acceptance); acceptance state seeded here. Faz 8 operator console real API.
summary: Sentence never became a task by itself. It passed through: ConceptPacket → Classifier → Extractor → RuleCandidate (REAL pipeline, Step 1) → PredicateStub → CrossFamilyHint → operator binding → ExecutablePredicateSet → verify accepted (SEEDED, INV-C3 enforced in-crate) → create task → registry. Each gate is type-level enforced.
thesis: The sentence never becomes a task by itself.
title: Paper 3 — End-to-End Binding Chain Replay (lowering→task segment)
